title: ESCC spatial-to-bulk validation framework
description: Sanitized analysis code and reproducibility materials for a public-data spatial-to-bulk validation framework in esophageal squamous cell carcinoma. The archive excludes manuscript drafting, DOCX generation, cover-letter generation, and internal audit-rendering scripts.

creators.name: Yang, Haoshui
